name: GatewayAPI
description: GatewayAPI — European SMS gateway API with delivery tracking, two-way messaging, and 20+ year uptime record.

seo.title: GatewayAPI — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: GatewayAPI: GatewayAPI — European SMS gateway API with delivery tracking, two-way messaging, and 20+ year uptime record.

when_to_use: European A2P SMS with 20+ year uptime for critical alerts
Two-way SMS for customer survey and feedback
Delivery tracking for transactional notification SMS
GDPR-compliant SMS platform for EU-based businesses
High-volume bulk SMS for Nordic market campaigns

pros: Long uptime record across European SMS routes
Simple, well-documented REST and SMPP APIs
Strong two-way SMS and delivery reporting
cons: No WhatsApp, RCS or voice channels
UI functional but far from modern
review.verdict: Quietly reliable European SMS gateway — boring, cheap, and does exactly what it promises.
review.best_for: European dev teams needing reliable A2P SMS without channel sprawl
review.not_for: Teams wanting omnichannel messaging or deep US/APAC reach

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
